setup_command: install dependencies and seed demo data with the selected web stack
run_command: start local web app with the stack run command
visible_result: local browser URL showing representative user flow
creator_local_review: creator opens local URL and reviews current UI plus trace or screenshot evidence
required_tests: unit integration Playwright browser e2e and Lighthouse CI checks
user_simulation: Playwright browser e2e covers happy path and at least one failure path
feedback_surfaces: visual screenshot video trace console network log and test report
performance_monitoring: Lighthouse performance budget plus latency error and runtime metrics
acceptance_metrics: pass fail thresholds for tests accessibility and performance budget criteria
change_impact_measurement: before/after screenshot trace and performance comparison against baseline
telemetry_export: scripts/monitoring/export-telemetry-run.sh exports metadata-only telemetry bundle to telemetry-archive
failure_repair_loop: stop completion claim record failing signal fix smallest cause rerun failing check and full gate set export telemetry
evidence_artifacts: test report screenshot video trace log and telemetry bundle artifact
